schemas.contact module¶

Contact Schemas Module¶

This module defines Pydantic models for data validation and serialization of contact entities. It ensures consistent data structures for creating, updating, and retrieving contacts.

class schemas.contact.ContactBase(*, first_name: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=50)], last_name: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=50)], email: EmailStr, phone: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=20)], birthday: date, additional_data: Annotated[str | None, MaxLen(max_length=250)] = None)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Base schema for contact data.

first_name¶

The first name of the contact (max 50 chars).

Type:

str

last_name¶

The last name of the contact (max 50 chars).

Type:

str

email¶

Validated email address.

Type:

EmailStr

phone¶

Contact phone number (max 20 chars).

Type:

str

birthday¶

Date of birth of the contact.

Type:

date

additional_data¶

Optional notes or extra info (max 250 chars).

Type:

Optional[str]

additional_data: str | None¶
birthday: date¶
email: EmailStr¶
first_name: str¶
last_name: str¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

phone: str¶
class schemas.contact.ContactCreate(*, first_name: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=50)], last_name: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=50)], email: EmailStr, phone: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=20)], birthday: date, additional_data: Annotated[str | None, MaxLen(max_length=250)] = None)[source]¶

Bases: ContactBase

Schema for creating a new contact. Inherits all fields from ContactBase.

model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.contact.ContactResponse(*, first_name: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=50)], last_name: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=50)], email: EmailStr, phone: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=20)], birthday: date, additional_data: Annotated[str | None, MaxLen(max_length=250)] = None, id: int)[source]¶

Bases: ContactBase

Schema for the contact data returned in API responses.

Includes the database ID and handles conversion from SQLAlchemy models.

id¶

The unique identifier from the database.

Type:

int

id: int¶
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.contact.ContactUpdate(*, first_name: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=50)], last_name: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=50)], email: EmailStr, phone: Annotated[str, MaxLen(max_length=20)], birthday: date, additional_data: Annotated[str | None, MaxLen(max_length=250)] = None)[source]¶

Bases: ContactBase

Schema for updating an existing contact. Inherits all fields from ContactBase.

model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].
